name: North Korea
headline: North Korea FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical — Rotation backfill cycle (29-day staleness). May 2026 evidence sustains floor: HRW World Report 2026 documents continued systematic repression (forced labor, restricted movement, denial of food/healthcare); UN Special Rapporteur on DPRK human rights situation ongoing; OHCHR Seoul Office continues atrocities documentation infrastructure. May 2026 entity-specific signals include continued ballistic-missile testing trajectory (no civilian-harm pivot) and sustained refusal to engage UN human rights mechanisms. No new May 17 entity-specific event; floor sustained on structural-systemic conduct grounds. Already at floor (0.0); no downward movement available.

AWR.rationale: Floor sustained. State-level awareness of suffering is structurally suppressed; no information infrastructure for civilian recognition.

EMP.rationale: Floor sustained. Systematic denial of food security, healthcare, freedom of movement; UN COI 2014 findings still operative as canonical evidence base.

ACT.rationale: Floor sustained. AC2 proportionality: state resources allocated to ballistic missile/nuclear programs while population faces chronic food insecurity.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. Songbun caste system institutionalizes differential treatment; political-prisoner-camp population systematically excluded.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. IHRL violations institutionalized; no IHL framework engagement.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. Refusal to engage UN Special Rapporteur; no domestic accountability mechanism; sanctions-evasion patterns documented.

SYS.rationale: Floor sustained. Systems-level conduct: prison camp infrastructure (Kwanliso), political control, surveillance state — UN COI findings sustained.

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. State ideology structurally incompatible with INT-dimension consistency framework.

evidence.summary: Human Rights Watch World Report 2026: North Korea — continued systematic repression, forced labor, restricted movement, denial of food and healthcare.
OHCHR Seoul Office continues atrocity documentation infrastructure; UN Special Rapporteur on DPRK human rights situation ongoing mandate.
UN Commission of Inquiry 2014: crimes against humanity findings remain the canonical Tier-5 external accountability determination; no remediation events since.

keyEvidence: HRW World Report 2026: systematic repression sustained.

Structural-systemic floor sustained; no rehabilitative event documented.
Already at floor (0.0); no downward movement available.
rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0. North Korea's compassion infrastructure remains structurally incompatible with the methodology framework. The UN COI 2014 finding of crimes against humanity remains the canonical Tier-5 evidence anchor; HRW World Report 2026 and OHCHR ongoing documentation sustain the floor designation. Rotation backfill (29-day staleness) confirms no rehabilitative event has occurred. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
watches: Any UN engagement signal (Special Rapporteur access)
